logo.alt: Solstice logo mark: a stylized sun at the horizon in deep umber and terracotta on a warm parchment background.

hero.alt: A minimalist hero image featuring a matte ceramic vessel on linen, capturing the quiet but confident brand essence through soft morning light and a muted parchment palette.

feature_1.alt: A tactile, editorial close-up of a ceramic candle vessel and raw materials in soft daylight, establishing the craft narrative.

feature_2.alt: A tactile close-up of a ceramic candle vessel and raw ingredients in soft morning light, emphasizing the Dawn collection's bright, quiet aesthetic.

feature_3.alt: A tactile close-up of a hand-poured candle in a matte ceramic vessel, emphasizing the Dusk collection's deep umber tones and unhurried craft.

social_proof.alt: A tactile, editorial close-up of a ceramic candle vessel in a soft-lit studio, capturing the quiet but confident brand personality.

dawn.alt: Dawn collection: a ceramic candle vessel in soft morning light with bright, clean tones of bergamot and white tea.

meridian.alt: Meridian collection: a ceramic candle vessel in warm amber studio light, evoking the steady heat of midday.

dusk.alt: Dusk collection: a hand-poured candle in deep umber tones, capturing the final shift into candlelight.
